intro1: The Transportation Engineering Laboratory in the Department of Urban Engineering at Dong-A University conducts research in the field of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) in step with the rapid advancement of ICT technologies in the era of the Fourth Industrial Revolution. In particular, by leveraging microscopic simulation techniques to analyze the driving and movement behavior of individual vehicles, we carry out evaluations of various transportation facilities and their operations.
intro2: In addition, amid the shifting paradigm of the transportation field, we conduct research on eco-friendly transportation modes, Smart Mobility, and Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) for the realization of sustainable urban transportation. We primarily focus on evaluating safety and convenience from the user's perspective, and on providing recommendations regarding operational efficiency and applicability.

research_topics.title: Transportation Engineering
research_topics.desc: Driver behavior, TSM, traffic flow analysis, and more

research_topics.title: ITS
research_topics.desc: C-ITS, V2X, new transportation systems, and more

research_topics.title: Traffic Signals
research_topics.desc: Traffic signal control, operation, management, signal optimization, and more

research_topics.title: Traffic Safety
research_topics.desc: Traffic accident history data analysis, traffic safety facility evaluation, fire dispatch optimization, and more

research_topics.title: Traffic Simulation
research_topics.desc: VISSIM, VISSIM COM User Interface, and more

research_topics.title: Smart Mobility
research_topics.desc: Personal mobility, micro-mobility, Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS), autonomous vehicles, and more
